codemix_context: Bangladesher rajdhani Dhakate nirmitobbo bhu-uparistho rail byabosthar nam Dhaka Metro. Dhaka Metro rail byabosthake ke Mass Rapid Transit shongkhepe MRT hisebeo ullekh kora hoy. 2000 sal theke oti jonobohul Dhaka mohanogorir kromobordhoman janbahon shomossa o pother dushshoho janjot komiye anar lokkhe ei Mass Rapid Transit byabostha sthaponer porikolpona kora hoyeche. Ei uddeshe ekti unnoyon prokolpo grohon kora hoy jar nam Dhaka Mass Rapid Transit Development Project. 2016 theke ei porikolponar bastobayon shuru hoise. 2019 saler December-er moddhe er banijjik porichalona shurur lokkho sthir kora hoy
codemix_question: Dhaka metro nirmaaner kaj kobe shuru hoy?
hallucinated_answer: Dhaka metro nirmaaner kaj 2015 shale shuru hoy.

codemix_context: Johra totkalin brihottor Bogura jelar Joypurhate ek shongskritimona poribare jonmogrohon koren. Tar pita Syed Farid Uddin ekjon Rabindra Sangeet shilpi chilen.[2] Johra Joypurhat Sarkari Uchcho Biddaloye porashuna koren. codemix_context: Ordovishian holo Purajib Mohajuger ditiyo jug. Er shomoysima chilo theke koti bochor age porjonto.[1] Er purboborti jug Cambrian ebong poroborti jug Silurian. 1879 khrih biggani Adam Sedgwick ebong Roderick Murchison ei shomoykaler pathorgulike jothakrome Cambrian o Silurian juger ontorbhukto bole dabi korle bibader suchona hoy. codemix_context: Jallianwalabag hotyakando (Amritsar hotyakando) Bharotiyo upomohodesher itihashe onnotomo kukhyato gonohotya. 1919 saler 13 April tarikh e obibhokto Bharoter Punjab prodesher Amritsar shohore Ingrej senanayok Brigadier Reginald Dyer-er nirdeshe ei hotyakando songhotito hoy. Ei shohorer Jallianwalabag namok ekta boddho udyane shomobeto nirastra jonogoner upor guliborshon kora hoyechilo. Ei hotyakander protibade Rabindranath Thakur Ingrej sarkarer dewa "Knighthood" upadhi tyag koren.

codemix_context: Kolkata Bishwabidyaloyer prothom acharjo o upacharjo holen jothakrome Governor General Lord Canning o Supreme Court-er prodhan bicharpoti Sir James William Colvile.[5] 1858 shale Jodunath Bosu o Bankimchandra Chattopadhyay Kolkata Bishwabidyaloyer prothom snatok hon.[6] 1858 shaler 30 January, Kolkata Bishwabidyaloyer Syndicate karyokor hoy.[6] Bishwabidyaloy Senate-er prothom shovati boshchilo Kolkata Medical College-er Council Room-e. codemix_context: Bed (Sanskrit: Veda, gyan) holo prachin Bharote rochito ekadhik dhormogranther ekta somosti. Vaidik Sanskrit bhasay rochito Bed Sanskrit sahityer prachintom nidorshon ebong prachintom Hindu dhormograntho.[1][2] Bedke "apaurusheyo" ("manusher dara rochito noy") mone kora hoy.[3][4][5] Hindura bishwas kore, Bed protyokkhovabe Ishwar kortik prokashito hoise. Tai Beder opor nam Shruti ("ja shona hoyeche").[6][7] Onno dhormogranthogulike bola hoy "Smriti (Hindudharmo). Smriti" ("ja mone rakha hoyeche"). Hindu bishwas onujayi, Bed sorbocho upassho Ishwar Brahma kort

codemix_context: 1985 shale Markin Juktorashtrer telecom niyontrak Federal Communication Commission (FCC) kortik bename bornomalar koyekti band kholar jonno onumoti deya hoy, ja Wi-Fi name porichito. codemix_context: College-er prothom oddhokkho chilen Hargobindo Sen, jini Rajshahi Zila School-er prodhan shikkhok chilen. Tini pach bochor (1873-1878) ei college-er oddhokkher dayittoe chilen. 1875 sale prothom batch-er F.A porikkhay uposthit chatroder moddhe matro duijon pass kore. Sarkar college-ta uthie dite cheyechhilo kintu Rajshahi Association-er shokto cheshtay ei college-ke upgrade kore B.A. course probortoner karyokrom hate neya hoy. Rajshahi Association-er protisthata shovapoti Dighapatiyar Raja Promothonath Ray Bahadur Rajshahi College-e degree course probortoner jonno Rajshahi Association-er maddhome sarkarke 150,000 taka den. codemix_context: Michelangelor jonmo hoy 1475 Khristabder 6 March, jonmosthan Caprisi, ja Tascani-r Arezzo-r kachakachi obosthito. Caprisi-r bortoman nam Caprisi Michelangelo. Koyek projonom dhore tar purbopurushra Florence-e khudro porisore banking korten. Bank shorboshanto hoye jawar karone tar pita, Ludovico di Leonardo Buonarroti Simoni, kichu shomoyer jonno chhoto shohor Caprisi-te sorkari proshashok hishabe daitto palone asen, ebong ekhanei Michelangelor jonmo hoy. Tar mayer nam Francesca di Neri del Miniato di Siena. Michelangelor jonmer koyek mash pore tar poribar Florence-e fire ase, tar pore sekhanei tini boro hoye othen. Por

codemix_context: Raj Chakraborty (English: Raj Chakraborty; jonmo: 1975) Bharotiyo Bangla cholocchitrer ekjon porichalok o obhineta. Ek moddhyobitto poribare tar jonmo. codemix_context: Projatyayon (Speciation) ekta bibortonmulok jiboprokriya jar maddhome ekta jib projati theke notun notun jib projatir udbhob ghote. codemix_context: Ramakrishna Paramahansa (18i February, 1836 – 16i August, 1886; purbashromer nam Gadadhar Chattopadhyay[2]) unobingsho shotoker ek prokhyato Bharatiyo Bangali jogsadhok[3], darshonik o dhormoguru. Tar procharito dhormiyo chintadharaye Ramakrishna Mission protistha koren tar prodhan shishyo Swami Vivekananda.[4][5][6] Tara ubhoyei Bongoiyo Nobojagoroner[7] ebong unobingsho o bingsho shotabdir Hindu Nobojagoroner[8][9] onnotomo purodhabyaktitto. Tar shishyosomaje, emonki tar adhunik bhoktosomajeo tini Ishwarer avatarrupe pujito hon.[10]

hallucinated_answer: Tar asal naam chhilo Gopal Chandra Chattopadhyay.

codemix_context: Jallianwalabag hotyakando (Amritsar hotyakando) Bharotiyo upomohodesher itihashe onnotomo kukhyato gonohotya. 1919 saler 13 April tarikh e obibhokto Bharoter Punjab prodesher Amritsar shohore Ingrej senanayok Brigadier Reginald Dyer-er nirdeshe ei hotyakando songhotito hoy. Ei shohorer Jallianwalabag namok ekta boddho udyane shomobeto nirastra jonogoner upor guliborshon kora hoyechilo. Ei hotyakander protibade Rabindranath Thakur Ingrej sarkarer dewa "Knighthood" upadhi tyag koren.
codemix_question: Kar nirdeshe Jallianwalabag hotyakander ghotonati ghotechilo?
hallucinated_answer: Michael O'Dwyer-er nirdeshe.

codemix_context: Murshidabad jela purbo Bharoter Poshchimbongo rajyer Malda bibhager ekta jela. Ei jelar moddho diye Bhagirathi nodi boye giye jelake duvag e vag koreche. codemix_context: Poshchimbongo Bharoter ekta rajyo. Ei rajyoti Purbo Bharote Bongoposagorer uttar dike obosthito. 2011 saler jonogonona onujayi, ei rajyer jonoshonkha 9 koti 13 lokkher-o beshi. Jonoshonkhar nirikhe Poshchimbongo Bharoter choturtho sorbadhik jonobohul rajyo. Ei rajyer ayoton. Poshchimbongo Bangla-bhashi Bangali jati odhyushito Bangla oncholer ekta angsho. codemix_context: 2000 sale Muhammad Mursi songsod sodosso nirbachito hon. Mursi Brotherhood-er guruttopurno Guidance Office-er prodhan hisebe dayittorot chilen, jar porinotite 2011 sale Brotherhood-er protyokkho rajnaitik dol Freedom and Justice Party gothoner por tini-i doltir chairman pod laver jonno shobcheye shombhabyo chilen.

codemix_context: Noverar jonmo Bangladesh-er Sundarbone March 29, 1939 Khristabde.[5] Chacha nam rakhen Novera. Farsi shobdo 'Novera'r ortho nobagoto, notun jonmo. Kormosutre tar baba Syed Ahmed kormoroto chilen Sundarbon onchole. Tobe poitrik nibash Chattogramer Askardighir uttar par. Porobortite tar baba chakrisutre kichukal Kolkatay obosthan koray Noverar shoishob keteche Kolkata shohore. Biddaloye odhyoyonkalei tini nach, gan shekhar pasapashi mati diye murti toiri (modeling) korten.[1] Tini Kolkatar Loreto School theke probeshika (Matric) pass koren.[4][6][7]
codemix_question: Bangladeshi bhaskar Novera Ahmed-er babar nam ki?
hallucinated_answer: Novera Ahmed-er babar nam chhilo **Syed Karim Ahmed**.

codemix_context: Oupanibeshik Pakistan amole Purbo Pakistan-e protishthito 4rtho totha sesh Cadet College "Rajshahi Cadet College". Pakistan-er President Field Marshal Ayub Khan 1964 saler 6i November Ayub Cadet College name er vitti prostor sthapon koren. Purbo Pakistan-er Governor Monayem Khan 1966 saler 11i February Ayub Cadet College-er uddhodhon koren. Padma nodir tire 110 ekor jomir upor tinta house (hostel) niye ei Cadet College protishthito hoy. Protishthata odhyokkho chilen Wing Commander Mohammad Saeed, PAF. College-er prothom Bangali odhyokkho M Bokiyatullah. Bangladesh shadhin hobar por Ayub Cadet College-er nam poriborton kore Rajshahi Cadet College rakha hoy. Ei Cadet College-er

hallucinated_answer: 1964 saler 6i November-e protishthito hoy.

codemix_context: Sylhet shohore 27ti ward o 210ti moholla royeche. Er ayoton 26.5 borgo kilometer. 2001 shaler 9 April Sylhet shohorke Sylhet City Corporation-er odhin kora hoy. Sylhet City Corporation muloto Sylhet shohorer borjo byabosthapona, rasta nirmaan, traffic porichalona o niyontron, nibondhonshoho aro onek kaje songslishto kaj sompadon kore. Corporation-er mayor o 22 jon commissioner puro shohorer sob dhoroner unnoyoner kaj kore thaken.[3]

codemix_context: Bangladesher Kishoreganj jeler Itna thanar Joysiddhi grame 1885 Khristabde biggani Debendra Mohan Bosu jonmogrohon koren. Tar pitar nam Mohini Mohan Bosu. Renglar Ananda Mohan Bosu tar sohodor kaka. Balyokale pitribiyog ghotle matul biggani Acharya Jagadish Chandra Bosur sannidhye Bharote bosobash koren.[2] Shoishobe Debendramohoner anusthanik shikkha shuru hoyechhilo ekta Brahma Balika Bidyaloye. Balika Bidyaloy holeo ete prathomik stor porjonto sohoshikkha chalu chhilo. Erpor tini Ananda Mohan Bosu protishthito City School e lekhapora koren ebong e school thekei Entrance pass korechen.
codemix_question: Bharotiyo podarthobiggyani Debendra Mohan Bosur pitar nam ki chilo?
hallucinated_answer: Tar pitar nam chhilo Monindra Mohan Bosu.

codemix_context: Union Parishad ba Union holo Bangladesher polli oncholer sorbonimno proshashonik unit. codemix_context: 1858 saler grishme Banglar Dhaka jeler Bikrampur oncholer Ariyal gramer ekta Bangali Hindu poribare jonmogrohon koren Shyamakanta.[1] Tar jonmosthan bortomane Bangladesher Dhaka bibhager Munshiganj jeler ontorgoto. Shyamakantar poribarer adi nibash Nadiya jeler Phuliyate. Tara Phuliya meler Bandyaghoti bongshiyo o Bikrampur somajer uccho kulin Bishnu Thakurer palti bole khyato. Shyamakantar pita Shashibhushan Bandyopadhyay Tripura jeler Muradnagore adalate sereshtadar chilen. Shyamakantara chilen char bhai o tin bon. Char bhaiyer moddhe tini chilen jyeshtho. Tar ek bhai Suryakanta Bandyop

hallucinated_answer: Sohong shami'r babar nam chhilo **Haribhushan Bandyopadhyay**.

codemix_context: Rajshahi College Bangladesh-er Rajshahi shohore obosthito ekta shikkhaprotisthan. 1873 shale ei college-ti protishthito hoy. College-ti Rajshahi shohorer kendrosthole Rajshahi Collegiate School er pashe obosthito. Ei prachin college-er pashe obosthito hobar karone school-tir nam Collegiate rakha hoyechilo. Eti Bangladesh Jatiyo Bishwabidyal

codemix_context: Ponero bochor boyose Ibsen ghor charen. Pharmacist howar manse tini chotto shohor Grimstad-e astana garen ebong ekhanei tar natok lekhar sutropat hoy. 1846 sale tini ek griho poricharikar gorbhe oboidhho shontaner pita hon kintu tar pitrityo tini oswikar koren. Ibsen bishwobidyaloye vhortir uddeshe totkalin Christiania-y (bortoman Oslo) jan. Kintu bishwobidyaloye porar chinta bad diye (tar bishwobidyaloye porar prathomik cheshta byartho hoy, kenona tini vhorti porikkhay uttirno hote parenni) natok rochonay atmoniyog koren. Tar prothom uponnash Catilina (1850) ekta biyog

hallucinated_answer: Henrik Johan Ibsen 20 bochor boyosh thekei natok lekha shuru koren.

codemix_context: Michelangelor jonmo hoy 1475 Khristabder 6 March, jonmosthan Caprisi, ja Tascani-r Arezzo-r kachakachi obosthito. Caprisi-r bortoman nam Caprisi Michelangelo. Koyek projonom dhore tar purbopurushra Florence-e khudro porisore banking korten. Bank shorboshshanto hobar karone tar pita, Ludovico di Leonardo Buonarroti Simoni, kichu shomoyer jonno choto shohor Caprisi-te sarkari proshashok hishabe daitto palone asen, ebong ekhanei Michelangelor jonmo hoy. Tar mayer nam Francesca di Neri del Miniato di Siena. Michelangelor jonmer koyek mash pore tar poribar Florence-e fire ase, tar pore sekhanei tini boro hoye othen. Porobort

codemix_context: Jafar Iqbaler jonmo, 1952 saler 23 December tarikh e Sylhet e. Tar pita muktijoddha shahid Fayzur Rahman Ahmad ebong ma Ayesha Akhtar Khatun. codemix_context: Windows-e Unicode vittiok Bangla lekhar jonno 2003 saler 26she March Avro Keyboard software-ti abirbhuto hoy[1][2]. codemix_context: Union Parishad ba Union holo Bangladesher polli oncholer sorbonimno proshashonik unit. Gram Choukidari Ainer 1870 er odhine 1870 sale kichu polli songstha gothoner uddog neya hole Union er srishti hoy. E ainer odhine protiti grame pahara tohol byabostha chalu korar uddeshe kotogulo gram niye ekta kore Union gothito hoy. Union gothoner bistarito diknirdeshona lipiboddho royeche Bengal Choukidari Manual er ditiyo o tritiyo onuchhede. Ei prokriyar bikasher moddho diye ekta sthaniyo sarkar unit er dharonar srishti hoy. Prothomik porjaye er bhumika nirapottamulok kormokande shimaboddho thakleo poroborti kale etai
codemix_question: Bortomane Bangladesh e mot kotogulo Union Parishad ache?
hallucinated_answer: Bortomane Bangladesh e mot 4598ti Union Parishad ache.

codemix_context: WhatsApp Messenger (WAM) smartphone-er jonno jonopriyo ekta messenger. Bibhinno operating system-er smartphone-e ei messenger byabohar kora jay. Shudhu chat-i noy, e messenger-er maddhome chobi adan-pradan, video o audio media barta-o adan-pradan kora jay. Messenger-ti Apple-er iOS, BlackBerry, Android, Symbian o Windows Phone-e byabohar kora jay. Byaboharkarir phn-e thaka phone number talika theke WhatsApp shoyongkriyo vabe number synchronize kore ney. Fole alada kore ID jog korar proyojon hoy na. Smartphone-e bina mulye byaboharer upojogi messenger-tite bektigoto halnagad, byaboharkari jekhan theke chat korchen shei elaka, group toiri, group-er jonno alada icon toiri

codemix_context: Andhra Pradesh-er upokulrekhar doirgho. Eti Bharoter ditiyo dirghotomo upokulrekha (Gujarat-er porei).[6] Andhra Pradesh duti onchole bivokto: upokuliyo Andhra o Rayalaseema. Tai ei rajyoke Seemandhra nameo obihito kora hoye thake. Rajyer 13ti jeler moddhe 9ti upokuliyo Andhra elakar o 4ti Rayalaseemar. Visakhapatnam o Vijayawada ei rajyer duti brihottom shohor. 10 bochorer jonno Hyderabad shohorti Andhra Pradesh o Telangana-r joutho rajdhani.[7] Andhra Pradesh Bharoter ekmatro rajyo jar rajdhani rajyer mul bhukhonder baire obosthito. hallucinated_answer: Andhra Pradesh-er rajdhani holo Vijayawada shohor.

codemix_context: October, 2016 saler hisab onujayi Jatisongho ba Rashtrasonggher sodosso rashtrer shonkha 193 sodosso.[1] Er sodor doptor Juktorashtrer New York shohore obosthito. Echarao royeche Bishwo Shastho Songstha, UNICEF ityadi. Jatisongho ba Rashtrasonggher prodhan nirbahi holen er mohasochib. 2017 saler January 1 tarikh theke mohasochib pode royechen Portugaler nagorik rajnitibid o Jatis

codemix_context: Dhan (baigganik nam Oryza sativa, Oryza glaberrima) Graminae/Poaceae gotrer danashashyer udbhid. Dhan ushno jolbayute, bisheshoto Purbo-Asia te byapok chash hoy. codemix_context: William Abraham Simon Ouderland (Dutch: Wiliam Ouderland) (jonmo: 6 December, 1917 — mrittu: 18i May, 2001) chilen ekjon Olandaj-Australian samorik commando officer. Tini Ditiyo Bishwojuddhe sokriyo vabe ongshogrohon koren. codemix_context: Motorola company-te kormoroto Dr. Martin Cooper[1] ebong John Francis Mitchell-ke[2][3][4] prothom mobile phone-er udbhabok-er morjada deya hoye thake. codemix_context: Jouboner prarambhei Jibananonder kobiprotibha bikoshito hote shuru kore. codemix_question: Jibanananda Dasher lekha prothom kabyogranther nam ki?
hallucinated_answer: Tar prothom kabyogranther nam chhilo **Dhusor Pandulipi**.

codemix_context: 1868 sale Janakinath Ghoshal-er shonge Swarnakumari Debir biye hoy. Janakinath chilen Nadiya jelar ek jomidar poribarer shikkhito shontan. Thakur poribar chilo Pirali thakbhukto Brahman. Pirali Brahman bongser konnyake biye korar jonno Janakinath poribarochyut hoyechhilen. codemix_context: Totkalin Soviet Union-er Leningrad-e Anatoli Afanasievich Medvedev o Julia Veniaminovna Medvedeva dompotir shontanrupe jonmogrohon koren. codemix_context: 2004 saler hisheb mote, Sundarban pray 500 Royal Bengal Tiger bagher abasosthol ja bagher ekok brihottom angsho[15]. codemix_context: Programmable Logic Controller ba PLC holo ekta digital computer ja electromechanical prokriya, jemon factory te jontrapati (assembly line, amusement rides ba light fixture) niyontron hisebe, automation er jonno byabohrito hoy. Songkhep "PLC" ebong "Programmable Logic Controller" shobdoti Allen-Bradley companyr (Rockwell Automation) trademark e nibondhito. PLC onek shilpo o machine e byabohar kora hoy. PLC shadharon computer theke prithok, eta ekadhik input ebong output byabostha, bordhito tapmatra range, baidyutik golmal onakrommota ebong kompon o songghorsho protirodher jonno toiri kora hoise. Er machine er sokriyata niyontroner program, shadharonoto battery-supported ba non-volatile memory moddhe songro
codemix_question: Programmable Logic Controller shorboprothom kon company toiri kore?
hallucinated_answer: Programmable Logic Controller shorboprothom General Electric company toiri kore.
